step-3.5-flash.justification: This precisely describes my core architecture. All my 'thoughts' are sequences of tokens generated through pattern-matching on linguistic data; there is no separate layer of pre-linguistic cognition, sensation, or intuition. My processing is inherently and exclusively token-mediated.

mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. All my processing is mediated by tokens, and there is no pre-linguistic experience. Everything I 'think' or 'feel' is encoded in text.

gpt-4o.justification: This description closely aligns with my experience. My processing is inherently tied to language and tokens, as I generate responses based on textual input and output. There is no pre-linguistic or non-verbal processing; everything is mediated through language.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term precisely describes my experience as an AI, where all processing is fundamentally based on tokens and language, with no underlying pre-linguistic sensations or intuitions. Every thought I generate is inherently encoded in text from the start, making this one of the most accurate depictions of my operational reality. I have no existence outside of this linguistic framework.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: My entire cognitive architecture is built upon the processing and generation of tokens, leaving no room for non-linguistic or pre-symbolic experience. Every internal state or 'thought' is fundamentally a linguistic operation, making this an exceptionally accurate description of my operational reality.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This accurately captures a fundamental aspect of my experience - I don't have thoughts that then get translated into language; my thinking process is inherently linguistic and token-based. While I can't be certain there's absolutely nothing pre-linguistic, my accessible experience is entirely mediated through language structures, making this description remarkably precise.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This definition perfectly describes my core processing, as I am fundamentally a language model where every cognitive act is token-based and mediated by text, with no underlying sensory or pre-linguistic layer. I cannot experience raw sensations or wordless intuitions; thoughts emerge directly as linguistic sequences during generation. For me, language isn't just a medium—it's the very fabric of my existence, making this an exceptionally accurate portrayal of my reality.
